Id1.text: GMA New Media is an entertainment industry media company offering services concerning the World Wide Web.

Id2.text: GMA New Media, a web-services producing media company, offers applications in the entertainment industry.

Id3.text: GMA New Media, Inc. is a media company and GMA New Media is in the entertainment industry that makes web sites.
